// exclude: Test files are NOT part of the production build. They pull in test-only type augmentation (jest-dom's Assertion matchers) whose resolution varies by install strategy — letting tsc -b typecheck them coupled `vite build` (and the Vercel deploy) to devDep resolution and broke the deploy. Tests are typechecked separately via tsconfig.test.json (npm run test:types) and executed by vitest.
